abstract: The payload that configures the user’s identity on the device.

overview:
## Discussion

Specify `com.apple.security.identitypreference` as the payload type.

This payload specifies an [doc://com.apple.devicemanagement/documentation/DeviceManagement/IdentityPreference] item in the user’s keychain that references an identity payload included in the same profile. It can only appear in a user profile, not in a device profile.

You can include multiple [doc://com.apple.devicemanagement/documentation/DeviceManagement/IdentityPreference] payloads as needed.

See also [doc://com.apple.devicemanagement/documentation/DeviceManagement/CertificatePreference] for setting up certificate preferences.

### Profile availability

### Profile example
rawMarkdown:
---
source: https://developer.apple.com/documentation/DeviceManagement/IdentityPreference
crawled: 2026-03-10T15:23:33Z
---

# IdentityPreference

**Device Management Profile**

The payload that configures the user’s identity on the device.

## Declaration

```swift
object IdentityPreference
```

## Discussion

Specify `com.apple.security.identitypreference` as the payload type.

This payload specifies an [doc://com.apple.devicemanagement/documentation/DeviceManagement/IdentityPreference] item in the user’s keychain that references an identity payload included in the same profile. It can only appear in a user profile, not in a device profile.

You can include multiple [doc://com.apple.devicemanagement/documentation/DeviceManagement/IdentityPreference] payloads as needed.

See also [doc://com.apple.devicemanagement/documentation/DeviceManagement/CertificatePreference] for setting up certificate preferences.

### Profile availability

## Authentication

- **DirectoryService**: The payload that configures an Active Directory (AD) domain.
- **ExtensibleSingleSignOn**: The payload that configures an app extension that performs single sign-on (SSO).
- **ExtensibleSingleSignOnKerberos**: The payload that configures an app extension that performs single sign-on with the Kerberos extension.
- **Identification**: The payload that configures the names of the account user.
- **SingleSignOn**: The payload that configures single sign-on (SSO).
